basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Assistant, Sr. Project Scientist and More Post
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Project Appointment Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Delhi. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Delhi Project Appointment Recruitment 2026 for the posts of Principal Project Scientist, Senior Project Scientist, and Project Assistant (Tech.).

age_limit.details: No specific age limit is mentioned for any of the posts. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D., M.Tech., Diploma (03 years duration)/ Graduate degree with relevant experience.
qualification.details: Principal Project Scientist: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree in the appropriate discipline. Minimum 3 to 5 years of Hands on Experience in Cryo-EM and Data Analysis. Strong Understanding of Sample Preparation, vitrification, Microscope Alignment and Imaging and image processing software. Ability to train users and manage shared facilities. Sr. Project Scientist: M.Tech. with first class or equivalent in a relevant discipline. M.Sc. with first class or equivalent and over three years of experience and mandatory hands-on experience in optical spectroscopy, including lifetime measurements, subdiffraction limit optical microscopy, and photoluminescence spectroscopy instrument operations. Project Assistant (Tech.): Diploma (03 years duration)/ Graduate degree in appropriate discipline with 02 years relevant work experience in relevant field OR ITI (2 years duration) in relevant field with 8 years relevant work experience. Experience in SEM, optical and confocal microscopy, Super resolution fluorescent Microscopy etc. is must.

selection_process: Shortlisting of eligible candidates Online interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_delhi_iit: Ph.D., M.Tech., Diploma (03 years duration)/ Graduate degree with relevant experience.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Delhi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Principal Project Scientist: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree in the appropriate discipline. Minimum 3 to 5 years of Hands on Experience in Cryo-EM and Data Analysis. Strong Understanding of Sample Preparation, vitrification, Microscope Alignment and Imaging and image processing software. Ability to train users and manage shared facilities. Sr. Project Scientist: M.Tech. with first class or equivalent in a relevant discipline. M.Sc. with first class or equivalent and over three years of experience and mandatory hands-on experience in optical spectroscopy, including lifetime measurements, subdiffraction limit optical microscopy, and photoluminescence spectroscopy instrument operations. Project Assistant (Tech.): Diploma (03 years duration)/ Graduate degree in appropriate discipline with 02 years relevant work experience in relevant field OR ITI (2 years duration) in relevant field with 8 years relevant work experience. Experience in SEM, optical and confocal microscopy, Super resolution fluorescent Microscopy etc. is must.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: No specific age limit is mentioned for any of the posts. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

rows.event: Last date for submitting applications by email

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting of eligible candidates Online interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Delhi Project Appointment posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications via email is 29th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Appointment at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for Project Appointment posts at IIT Delhi. These include positions for Principal Project Scientist, Sr. Project Scientist, and Project Assistant (Tech.).

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Project Assistant (Tech.) post?
faq.answer: For the Project Assistant (Tech.) post, a Diploma (03 years duration) or Graduate degree in an appropriate discipline with 02 years of relevant work experience is required. An ITI (2 years duration) with 8 years of experience is also acceptable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email. Candidates need to send their duly filled application form and required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary range for the Principal Project Scientist position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Principal Project Scientist position ranges from Rs. 75,600 to Rs. 1,01,610/- per month, plus HRA at 27%.

faq.question: Q6. Does IIT Delhi offer age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify age relaxation details for reserved categories. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for any such information.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these project-based appointments?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an online interview. Specific details may be provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form for IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application form (Form No. IRD/REC-4) can be downloaded from the IRD Website: http://ird.iitd.ac.in/rec.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for IIT Delhi recruitment updates?
faq.answer: The official website for IIT Delhi recruitment updates, specifically for IRD projects, is http://ird.iitd.ac.in/rec.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any specific experience requirements for the Sr. Project Scientist post?
faq.answer: Yes, for the Sr. Project Scientist post, candidates with an M.Sc. degree require over three years of experience and mandatory hands-on experience in optical spectroscopy, including lifetime measurements, subdiffraction limit optical microscopy, and photoluminescence spectroscopy instrument operations.
